changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Moving Blunder"

TextENGNew: ``...Huh? Does anyone know anything about the package that was here?``
``Oh, you mean that large piece of furniture? If that's what you're looking for, Toujima-san loaded it on the truck earlier and it's already out for delivery.``
``Huuh~?! But, wasn't it specifically scheduled for delivery tomorrow? If the customer receives it today they'll be upset!``
``Really?! But it went out two hours ago...``
``Unbelievable...! How could we make such a basic mistake? Isn't Toujima-kun supposed to be a seasoned veteran?``
``Oh... well yes, but it seems we received a call from the recipient, requesting to do it today. So, Toujima-san angrily obliged the customer's selfish request.``
``Huh...? Really? But the department store manager told us over and over that we had to avoid delivering today since nobody would be available, didn't they?``
``I don't know the details. ...Haah, I know the customer's always right, but I wish they'd consider the trouble they're causing us for once.``
``...Absolutely. So, what's the name of the recipient for this troublesome delivery?``
``Uhh... oh, here it is. The last name is Ryuugu-san. Address is......``
